title: Mobile Function Blocks
description: Comfortable pocket things: ender chest, craft table, anvil and more
body:
It happens that sometimes you need to get an item out of the ender chest. First you need to put it down, take an object from it and, preferably, take it with you, and then only with the help of a pickaxe on silk.

The Mobile Function Blocks plugin adds compact functional blocks to the game that can be used by hand only by pressing the PCM.

The plugin adds: a compact workbench, an ender chest, a blacksmith's table, an anvil, a cartographer's table, a whetstone, a loom and a stone cutter.

You can get these items using the /givemobilefunctionblocks command, or through crafting (crafting is shown in the picture below)
![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81477dcfdf12ffe07d1aae3b21614f77c2fd7d83.jpeg)
